scene_title: L'ago si ferma — punta verso il mare
narrative_role: Atto III, la decisione. La bussola indica la nuova rotta.

prompt_components.shot_type: Macro close-up on compass face, then pull back to medium shot
prompt_components.subject: the orange compass face with its hexagonal glass, the needle slowing and stopping on a precise direction
prompt_components.action: the needle, glowing orange, slows its rotation and stops pointing toward a specific direction — the direction of the open ocean; the camera then slowly pulls back to reveal the compass on the sand pointing toward the sea visible in the distance
prompt_components.environment: white sand foreground, blue desaturated ocean in the background as the camera pulls back, soft afternoon light
prompt_components.camera_movement: starts macro on compass, then slow steady dolly out revealing the larger landscape, ending wide enough to see compass + ocean horizon
prompt_components.lighting: warm afternoon light, plus the compass's inner orange glow
prompt_components.mood: decisive, hopeful, the moment of clarity
prompt_components.audio_hint: the warm resonance reaches a peaceful resolution, music swells gently with strings entering, calm waves in distance

acceptance_criteria: L'ago si ferma chiaramente in una direzione
Risoluzione audio: la musica entra qui
L'oceano in lontananza nel frame finale
